message:
test(fuzz): extend fuzz_dataframe_eval corpus with 30 structured seeds

Add adversarial seeds covering DataFrame.eval() expression parsing:
- Arithmetic: add, sub, mul, div, chain, parenthesized
- Comparisons: gt, lt, gte, lte, eq, neq
- Unary operators: negation, positive
- Multi-column: 4-column chains and nested parentheses
- Dtype variants: int64 and float64 columns
- Literals: column + literal operations
- Self-operations: a-a, a/a
- Power/floor/modulo operators
- Edge cases: null values, 8-row frames, hardened policy

Adds replay test fuzz_dataframe_eval_bytes_replays_committed_corpus_seeds
to validate all 31 seeds (30 new + 1 existing seed-empty.bin).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
